creator: jake@checker.org
text:
The post-install message for /usr/ports/audio/cmp3/ cites
the incorrect path for the README file.
should be ${PREFIX}/share/doc/cmp3/README, not
${PREFIX}/share/cmp3/README

Fix: patch included, (/usr/ports/audio/cmp3/pkg/MESSAGE):
How-To-Repeat: 
install the port,

# less /usr/local/share/cmp3/README
/usr/local/share/cmp3/README: No such file or directory
